category_sources: Official Docker GitHub README says Docker Hub Tool is a CLI for interacting with Docker Hub.
source_facts.description says hub-tool is a Docker Hub experimental CLI tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Docker Hub Tool.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo is the Docker GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/docker/hub-tool; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official Docker README says it interacts with Docker Hub and performs image information and Hub maintenance tasks; GitHub topics include docker, cli, registry, image, container, and hub.
source_facts.description mentions Docker Hub CLI tooling.
